case_title: SHU KAY YAM ET AL VS. ARMSTRONG TOWNHOMES HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE: $40.00) SERVED NOV-23-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG TOWNHOMES HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION C/O REALTY FINANCE MANAGEMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAM, SHU KAY CHAU, KING CHUEN AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG TOWNHOMES HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION C/O REALTY FINANCE MANAGEMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-03-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG TOWNHOMES HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION C/O REALTY FINANCE MANAGEMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SHU KAY YAM IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER AMANDA PEETERS. PLAINTIFF KINO CHUEN CHAU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER AMANDA PEETERS. DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG TOWNHOMES HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION C/O REALTY FINANCE MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JERALD JOSEPH (PROPERTY MANAGER) AND HAO LIN (PROPERTY MANAGER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY YAM, SHU KAY CHAU, KING CHUEN AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG TOWNHOMES HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION C/O REALTY FINANCE MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAM, SHU KAY CHAU, KING CHUEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG TOWNHOMES HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION C/O REALTY FINANCE MANAGEMENT THE COURT SPOKE TO WITNESS/CO-RESIDENT ABOUT HIS OBSERVATIONS. BASED ON ALL THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AT THE HEARING AND THE COURTS INVESTIGATION, THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2022 - JUDGMENT.
